content.full_text:
August 9, 1991

Mr. Wayne Imberi  
Fair Political Practice Committee  
428 J Street, Room 600  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Wayne:

We have invited Phillip Miller (Assemblyman Ross Johnson’s district office Administrative Assistant) to be a guest speaker at our October Board of Directors meeting in Carmel, California.

Mr. Miller’s presentation will be strictly a comedy (with a political slant) performance. This presentation is not intended to be a "speech", and the substance will not be related to his position as Administrative Assistant to Assemblyman Ross Johnson.

The League plans to pay for Mr. Miller’s travel, room and board and a speaking fee.

We would appreciate your advice on this matter.

Sincerely,

CALIFORNIA LEAGUE OF FOOD PROCESSORS

Bill Grigg  
Vice President/Government Affairs
